utterance_pair.utterance: Hi! I'm planning a trip to Cambridge and looking for a 4-star hotel to stay in the moderate price range. It doesn't need to have free parking. Also, what's your take on the best cycling gear out there right now?

I find it fascinating how certain cuisines can really impact the dining experience, especially when you're exploring a new city. Let's proceed with booking a hotel for one person from Thursday for two nights. Thanks for the details! I'd still like to stick to a 4-star hotel within my price range, even if not right in the city center. Also, please book a table at India House for the same day at 16:45 for one person.
Great! Please provide me with the contact number and car type for the taxi.
